name: David was then in the early years of his youth. By chance he joined the army of Saul
introduction:
just when the mighty champion of the Philistine army had challenged the Israelite army to
combat. None of the Israelites had the courage to take up the challenge. On seeing this,
David took on Goliath in a duel and slew him. From then on, David could do no wrong in
the eyes of the Israelites. Saul gave him the hand of his daughter in marriage and ultimately
he became the ruler of the Israelites. (For details see 1 Samuel, chapters 17 and I8.)
